title: asteriscus aquaticus subsp. pygmaeus
intro: Asteriscus aquaticus subsp. pygmaeus, also known as Dwarf Marsh Cudweed, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. The medicinal properties of this plant have been studied for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are beneficial for the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of Asteriscus aquaticus subsp. pygmaeus include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestive health, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used to soothe digestive issues and reduce stress.
